mapper.select: select base_dt, bf_bf_biz_dt, bf_biz_dt, biz_dt, nxt_biz_dt, nxt_nxt_biz_dt, hldy_yn, inst_cd from cotdl.tbl_piibizday order by base_dt
mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piibizday (base_dt, bf_bf_biz_dt, bf_biz_dt, biz_dt, nxt_biz_dt, nxt_nxt_biz_dt, hldy_yn, inst_cd) values (#{base_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bf_bf_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bf_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nxt_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nxt_nxt_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hldy_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inst_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into COTDL.tbl_piibizday (base_dt, bf_bf_biz_dt, bf_biz_dt, biz_dt, nxt_biz_dt, nxt_nxt_biz_dt, hldy_yn, inst_cd) values (#{base_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bf_bf_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bf_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nxt_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nxt_nxt_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hldy_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inst_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piibizday where base_dt= #{base_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piibizday set bf_bf_biz_dt= #{bf_bf_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bf_biz_dt= #{bf_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, biz_dt= #{biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nxt_biz_dt= #{nxt_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nxt_nxt_biz_dt= #{nxt_nxt_biz_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hldy_yn= #{hldy_yn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inst_cd= #{inst_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where base_dt= #{base_dt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
